MWCapture SDK  3.3.1.1556

C++ Examples

MWCapture SDKv3 has plenty C/C++ examples, which are developed based on graphical user interface with GUI (C++), or command with CmdTools (C++).

With CmdTools (C++), you can use the APIs to build your applications with high performance, great flexibility, and wide applicability. The code structure is clear and simple. And examples basically cover all the capture card features which are ideal for understanding the way that SDKv3 functions work and the capture procedure for audio and video.

GUI (C++) supports to render audio and video, and you can preview the captured data.
